ratings.title: Playstyle Rating
ratings.noRatingsYet: No ratings yet. Be the first to rate!

damage.title: 1. Offense (Damage)
damage.meaning: Ability to deal damage to enemy units or the Nexus.
damage.radar: High damage potential from units like Aatrox, Pyke, Ambessa, or heavy spell and skill damage like Swain, Vex.

defense.title: 2. Defense (Safety)
defense.meaning: Survivability across multiple rounds and encounters (Healing, Lifesteal, Stuns, Frostbites, Board Control).
defense.radar: High scores (like Yasuo, Morgana, Ashe) indicate a resilient champion with low risk against tough Bosses.

speed.title: 3. Speed (Tempo)
speed.meaning: Fast board development and quick match completion.
speed.radar: Emphasizes the ability to overwhelm the enemy from Turn 1 or 2, such as Nidalee, Swain, Lillia.

consistency.title: 4. Consistency (Deck Flow)
consistency.meaning: The fluidity of the starting deck. Ability to draw cards, avoid mana bricks, and rely less on RNG.
consistency.radar: High scores prove a tightly designed deck that rarely suffers from 'brick hands', like Jhin or Ambessa.

synergy.title: 5. Synergy (Combo)
synergy.meaning: Ability to create chain effects between the Champion, Constellations, and Relics.
synergy.radar: Champions like Ekko or Akshan showcase a flashy playstyle with powerful combo potential.

independence.title: 6. Independence
independence.meaning: The deck's capability to win without needing to draw or play the main Champion card.
independence.radar: High scores (Swain, Aurelion Sol, Kai'sa) mean the deck functions well on its own. Low scores (Vayne, Lillia, Gwen) warn that if the champion is removed or not drawn, the loss rate is very high.

about.subtitle: The complete guide for Path of Champions – from the developer of this website
about.intro1: Guide POC is an independent, fan-made website created to help Legends of Runeterra players conquer the Path of Champions mode with reliable and easy-to-use resources. We are not affiliated with Riot Games or any of its subsidiaries.
about.intro2: This platform was built by players, for players — born out of a pure passion for PoC's unique roguelike mechanics and its surrounding community.
about.whoWeAre1: Guide POC is an independent project built by a small team (actually, just me :v) of passionate gamers in Vietnam.
about.whoWeAre2: I started playing and experiencing the Path of Champions mode from day one when it first launched. From a rookie, I began my passion — exploring different champions, maps, discovering new tactics, and I wanted to share it with the community.
about.whoWeAre3: We documented everything: which playstyles work best, which relics synergize strongly with which champions, which powers to pick at every crossroad, and which champions can overcome the hardest challenges. — refining them together after every update.
about.whoWeAre4: Around April 2025, I realized the knowledge accumulated over thousands of runs could help many players — especially those struggling with the increasing difficulty. That was when Guide POC was officially born.
about.whoWeAre5: The website is founded and maintained by me, along with frequent contributions from players sharing the same spirit of curiosity and cooperation.
about.whatWeDoLi1: Recommending optimal relic builds for each champion
about.whatWeDoLi2: Suggesting which relics, powers, and items are useful and should be prioritized
about.whatWeDoLi3: Guiding playstyles and highly effective champion combos
about.whatWeDoLi4: Updating strategies after every patch and delivering new tactics
about.whatWeDoOutro: Our goal is to provide content that is clear, fluff-free, constantly updated, and easily accessible for both newcomers and veterans looking to improve their skills or share knowledge.
about.whyWeDoIt1: Because we love this game mode and I wanted a place to share my passion.
about.whyWeDoIt2: This website was born to share passion — from me to everyone, and from the community to each other.
about.whyWeDoIt3: Thank you for visiting. If you find the content helpful, please share it with your friends — and if you want to contribute builds or feedback, we would love to hear from you.
about.whyGuidePoc1: We chose the name "Guide POC" simply because it is a dedicated guide website for this mode, short and easy to remember.
about.whyGuidePoc2: “POCâ€ stands for Path of Champions — the mode that brought us together, where every decision can change the entire journey.
about.whyGuidePoc3: “Guideâ€ represents our mission: providing a reliable roadmap for players. Whether you're a new adventurer or a veteran maxing out all champions, we want you to have a smooth journey.
about.whyGuidePoc4: Thank you for accompanying us on the Path of Champions!

intro.subtitle: Path of Champions is a unique roguelike mode in Legends of Runeterra – where every run is a new journey, and every decision can alter the entire battle.
intro.card1Desc: Every map is procedurally generated – no two runs are identical.
intro.card2Desc: Collect Relics and Powers to turn ordinary champions into monsters.
intro.card3Desc: Defeat all bosses and crossroads to reach 7 stars for each champion.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: Welcome to Guide POC. Please read these terms carefully before using.
terms.section1P1: Guide POC is an independent website, built and operated entirely by fans of Legends of Runeterra.
terms.section1P2: We are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Riot Games, Riot Forge, or any of their subsidiaries.
terms.section1P3: All names, images, characters, game mechanics, and intellectual property within Path of Champions legally belong to Riot Games.
terms.section2P1: All original content on Guide POC — including build guides, farming routes, relic analysis, and illustrations — is created by the community solely for the purpose of sharing information and assisting players.
terms.section2Li1: You are free to read, share, or link to our content for personal or non-commercial purposes.
terms.section2Li2: Please do not copy, re-upload, or redistribute our content without proper credit.
terms.section2Li3: If reusing (translations, videos, articles), full credit is mandatory along with a link back to the original page.
terms.section3P1: We always strive to keep information accurate and up-to-date based on datamines, practical testing, and official patches.
terms.section3P2: However, game mechanics may change due to updates, hotfixes, or balance changes. Guide POC does not guarantee 100% accuracy at all times.
terms.section3P3: Please treat our guides as reference suggestions, not absolute rules.
terms.section4P1: By using Guide POC, you agree to:
terms.section4Li1: Use the content for legal and respectful purposes.
terms.section4Li2: Not intentionally sabotage, attack, or abuse website resources (including spam, bots, DDoS).
terms.section4Li3: Accept that all content is provided "as is" — without warranty regarding accuracy, completeness, or availability.
terms.section5P1: The website may contain links to third-party websites, videos, or resources (YouTube, Discord, wikis, etc.).
terms.section5P2: We are not responsible for the content, accuracy, or privacy policies of those sites.
terms.section6P1: We reserve the right to update or modify these terms at any time without prior notice.
terms.section6P2: Your continued use of the website following any changes signifies your acceptance of the latest version.

vaultSimulator.description: Simulate accurate drop rates based on community data. Choose a vault tier to start testing your luck!
vaultSimulator.probBronzeSilverDesc:
Champion Fragments for early game progression.
• Bronze Vault: 95% to drop 5, 5% to drop 10 fragments.
• Silver Vault: 90% to drop 10, 10% to drop 15 fragments.
vaultSimulator.probGoldPlatinumDesc:
Relics start dropping here.
• Gold Vault: 90% for 20, 10% for 30 (20+10) Frags. 30% chance for Common Relic (Always included with 30 Frags).
• Platinum Vault: 60% for 40, 30% for 40 (20+20), 10% for 50 (30+20) Frags. 30% chance for Rare Relic (Always included with 50 Frags).
vaultSimulator.probDiamondDesc:
The ultimate rewards.
• Champ Frags: 75% for 80 (40+40), 20% for 120 (40+40+40), 5% for 240 (80+80+80) frags.
• Wild Frags: 85% for 20, 14% for 50, 1% for 100 frags.
• Relic Slot: 65% Cosmic Blessing, 35% Rare Relic.
• Bonus: 20% Star Crystal (x10), 5% Gemstone (x150).
